Marketing & Sales [...] Unfortunately, despite the marketing claims of "no setup hell" and "batteries included," the AI seemed to encounter a lot of errors, though it was able to move on from those errors on its own. This resulted in a lot of repeated, very inefficient requests, using more than 2 million tokens without successfully producing anything. I’m out of tokens on my paid plan, so I can’t finish this up for another 26 days.

Here's what I liked:

   Great Idea: The concept of using AI to build an AI powered tools is great.

   Intuitive Setup: Agent configuration and Trello connection were straightforward, fulfilling "just type a prompt" and "easier than no-code builders" claims.

   Self-repair: The agent diagnosed and recovered from errors autonomously, indicating strong underlying intelligence. [...] ### AI Agents

## Frequently asked questions about AI Agents
Real answers from real users, pulled straight from launch discussions, forums, and reviews.

   
### Q: Can AI agents be sandboxed in the browser without local file access?

8mo ago   

Happycapy shows it’s possible to run agent-like apps without relying on local files: reviewers praise its built-in AI, database, and analytics that let you build and launch agents that operate on cloud data. In practice, sandboxing in the browser without local file access means the platform must host the agent runtime, use cloud storage/APIs, and surface a secure in‑browser UI.

Rajiv Ayyangar
Product Hunt

Product Hunt

Just like actually coding, using Replit can take a wrong turn and end up feeling like banging your head against a wall. I burned through a bunch of checkpoints trying to get a simple button (kept seeing a blank screen), and eventually started over and it just worked. The promise here is incredible - I think in a few months even, many non-coders will be able to create pretty robust applications.

With greater power comes greater imagination...I think we might see an explosion of consumer app creativity as people build apps for themselves and a rare few take off.

results.title: Ditto Insurance Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Absolute not happy with their service. I live abroad and bought term insurance as per the suggestion of Ditto. After a severe thought purchased the Insurance and until the payment was complete and insurance was issued, there was no discussion about GST Refund. By the time I knew the info, they said getting a refund was impossible. After a lot of cry, they agreed to process it under special consideration. After almost 3 months of hassle and sharing of multiple documents and statements, the final verdict was No GST Refund as payment was performed using an NRO Savings account and not an NRE Savings account. The agent either had no clear idea of what info was supposed to share or they are trying to hide this information for some kind of benefit. Individually I am not happy with their service [...] of benefit. Individually I am not happy with their service and certainly would not recommend purchasing a policy through them. Better do your homework and use their service or stay away from them. [...] Baseless - AI-Powered No Code Builders

•10 reviews

10/10 for the consulting calls. These people truly care about their customers and it shows. I was truly satisfied

Report
